projectSettings.title: [ES] Project Settings
projectSettings.description: [ES] Configure project-level navigation defaults and theme token overrides. Changes persist across sessions via localStorage.
projectSettings.navSectionDesc: [ES] Controls which navigation components render at mobile breakpoints (<1024px) across all Walmart app pages. Persisted to localStorage — changes update the live app immediately.
projectSettings.platformDesc: [ES] Choose the target platform experience. Native modes add OS-specific status bars and navigation chrome.
projectSettings.webDesc: [ES] Standard responsive web layout. No native OS chrome. Uses browser viewport breakpoints for tablet and mobile views.
projectSettings.iosDesc: [ES] iOS native app experience with Dynamic Island, SF-style status bar, and home indicator. Tablet breakpoints simulate iPad views.
projectSettings.androidDesc: [ES] Android native app experience with Material-style status bar and navigation bar. Tablet breakpoints simulate Android tablet views.
projectSettings.localizationDesc: [ES] Controls the language used throughout the application. Persisted to localStorage — changes update the live app immediately.
projectSettings.magicDesc: [ES] Switches the AI/magic gradient color palette used across magic components — MagicBox, Smart Filters, loading skeletons, and step animations. Persisted to localStorage — changes update the live app immediately.
projectSettings.personaDesc: [ES] Choose the target audience persona to apply the corresponding magic color gradient.
projectSettings.customerDesc: [ES] Default Walmart customer experience. Classic blue-to-sky gradient used in the main shopping app.
projectSettings.partnerDesc: [ES] Supplier and developer partner experience. Blue-to-green gradient signals a developer/API context.
projectSettings.associateDesc: [ES] Walmart associate (employee) experience. Warm orange-to-gold gradient using the Walmart Spark palette.
projectSettings.themeDesc: [ES] Override the CSS custom properties that control the visual styling of the components. Persisted to localStorage.
